name: agyb-aas-python-api-builder
description: Install the "AAS Python API Builder" workflow plugin from Antigravity Awesome Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Build Python APIs and services with FastAPI, Django, Pydantic, OpenAPI, async patterns, tests, and API design.
interface.longDescription: Build Python APIs and services with FastAPI, Django, Pydantic, OpenAPI, async patterns, tests, and API design. A language-specialized plugin is useful when it bundles framework guidance, async patterns, testing, and API design together. Recommended for: Python backend teams, FastAPI and Django builders, API maintainers. Not for: Language-agnostic API governance, Frontend-only implementation. Covers Python Pro, Python Patterns, and 8 more skills.
defaultPrompt: Use this plugin to design a FastAPI service with routes, Pydantic models, validation, async boundaries, and tests.
Use this plugin to review this Django API for structure, performance, OpenAPI coverage, and test coverage.
Use this plugin to refactor this Python service toward clearer API and async patterns.
